description_long: This rifle features a blocky, geometric design with a predominantly black and tan color scheme. The main body is rectangular and robust, with a thick barrel extending from a square muzzle. Two tan-colored legs or supports are attached beneath the body, suggesting a bipod or stand for stability. The rear section includes a raised sight and a squared-off stock, while the midsection is wrapped with two black bands, possibly representing reinforcement or grip tape. The overall construction appears utilitarian and stylized, with minimal detailing and a focus on simple, angular forms.
description: A blocky, black and tan rifle with a square muzzle, bipod-like supports, and a raised rear sight. The design is geometric and utilitarian.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square muzzle and the symmetrical, blocky barrel opening.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tan bipod supports, black bands around the barrel, and the raised rear sight.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the squared-off stock and the alignment of the barrel and sight.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bipod supports, black bands, and the overall length of the rifle.
